'''Glithnos''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] by [[Jannie Ha'Nook]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{Mo}}
